title: Event types of audit logs
excerpt:
Hello Monday, 
Could you please let us know the API details for various event types of audit log. Events are like login, logout , download File etc… 
Thanks, 
Ravi P.

posts.author: PANRRAVI (RAVI)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday,

Could you please let us know the API details for various event types of audit log. Events are like login, logout , download File etc…

Thanks,
Ravi P.

posts.author: kwalker (Kristian Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ravi,

I can confirm the documentation page at Audit Log API – Support shows how to use the Audit logs API and on this page they have a section named Description of Audit Log events.

In this section they outline all of the events that can be used within the API.

I hope this helps.

Regards,
Kristian
